headline: Keurig Dr Pepper Reshapes Coffee Portfolio And Valuation Story
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (NasdaqGS:KDP) is proceeding with the acquisition of JDE Peet’s, supported by shareholder approval and a reduced acceptance threshold. The company plans to separate into two focused businesses, creating distinct pure play entities from its existing portfolio. Keurig Dr Pepper is launching the Keurig Coffee Collective, its first proprietary coffee brand in over thirty years, targeting the premium at home coffee segment. Keurig Dr Pepper, known for its beverage portfolio that...
